title: Add serialize_within_feature_tree field to SchedulerConfig
description: Add `serialize_within_feature_tree: bool = False` to the `SchedulerConfig` frozen dataclass in `src/agent_takt/config.py`. Ensure the YAML loader resolves the field to `False` silently when the key is absent, the entire `scheduler:` block is absent, or the entire `common:` block is absent — no warning, no error. The field should load from `common.scheduler.serialize_within_feature_tree`.
acceptance_criteria: `SchedulerConfig.serialize_within_feature_tree` exists as a `bool` field defaulting to `False`
Loading a YAML with no `scheduler` block resolves the field to `False` silently
Loading a YAML with no `common` block resolves the field to `False` silently
Loading a YAML with `common.scheduler.serialize_within_feature_tree: true` resolves the field to `True`
